use_codes.desc: USE OF THE ACTIVE INGREDIENT FOR INHIBITING THE BIOSYNTHESIS OF CHOLESTEROL AND TREATMENT OF ATHEROSCLEROSIS

ADJUNCT DIET IN THE TX OF ELEVATED TOTAL CHOLESTEROL AND LDL-C LEVELS IN PTS W/PRIMARY HYPERCHOLESTEROLEMIA WHOSE RESPONSE TO DIETARY RESTRICTION OF SAT FAT AND CHOLESTEROL AND OTHER NONPHARMACOLOGICAL MEASURES HAS NOT BEEN ADEQUATE

indications.text:
Therapy with lipid-altering agents should be a component of multiple risk factor intervention in those
individuals at significantly increased risk for atherosclerosis vascular disease due to hypercholesterolemia.
